tasks.title: Yil oxirigacha maqsadni aniqla
tasks.description: Yil oxirigacha qancha pul topmoqchisiz? Aniq raqam yozing. Masalan: $20,000 yoki 250 mln so'm. Oyiga qancha kerak - hisoblang. Qaysi xizmatdan eng ko'p keladi: app, bot, sayt?

tasks.title: Super portfolio yarating
tasks.description: Barcha ko'nikmalaringizni ko'rsatadigan portfolio yarating: Flutter app, Telegram bot, Web sayt namunalari. AI bilan 1 kunda tayyorlang.

tasks.title: Xizmatlar paketini tuzing
tasks.description: 3 ta xizmat paketi yarating: 1) Telegram bot - $200-500 2) Flutter app - $500-2000 3) Web sayt - $300-1000. AI bilan tez qilishingizni yozing.

tasks.title: 3 ta platformada profil oching
tasks.description: Upwork, Fiverr, Kwork (rus bozori) da profillar yarating. Har birida: Flutter Developer + Bot Developer + Web Developer deb yozing.

tasks.title: Telegram bot xizmatini reklama qiling
tasks.description: O'zbek Telegram guruhlarida bot yasash xizmatini taklif qiling. Namuna sifatida Boylik Bot'ni ko'rsating. 10 ta guruhga yozing.

tasks.title: 10 ta proposal yuboring
tasks.description: Upwork va Fiverr'da bot, app, web loyihalarga 10 ta proposal yuboring. AI bilan yaxshi proposal yozishni o'rganing.

tasks.title: O'z mahsulot g'oyalarini yozing
tasks.description: 10 ta SaaS/App/Bot g'oyasini yozing. Muammolarni hal qiladigan. AI bilan brainstorm qiling. Eng realistik 3 tasini belgilang.

tasks.title: Bot template yarating
tasks.description: Tez-tez so'raladigan bot turlarini template qilib qo'ying: Shop bot, Booking bot, Admin bot. Har biriga 1-2 soat ketsin.

tasks.title: Landing page template yarating
tasks.description: 3 ta landing page template tayyorlang: Biznes uchun, Startup uchun, Portfolio uchun. AI + Tailwind = tez.

tasks.title: MVP tanlang va boshlang
tasks.description: G'oyalaringizdan birini tanlang. Bugun MVP kodlashni boshlang. AI yordamida 2-3 soat ishlangg.

tasks.title: LinkedIn + Twitter faollashtiring
tasks.description: Har ikki platformada developer sifatida profil yangilang. Birinchi post yozing: qanday xizmatlar berasiz.

tasks.title: Yana 10 ta proposal
tasks.description: Har kuni 10 ta proposal yuboring. Bu odat bo'lsin. Javob kelmasa ham davom eting.

tasks.title: MVP davom ettiring
tasks.description: MVP'da davom eting. Asosiy funksiyalar tayyor bo'lsin. AI bilan tez yozing.

tasks.title: Haftalik tahlil
tasks.description: Hafta natijalari: nechta proposal, nechta javob, MVP qancha tayyor, qancha daromad? Yozib qo'ying.

tasks.title: Birinchi bot buyurtmasini oling
tasks.description: O'zbek bozorida bot buyurtmasi oling. Narxni past qo'ying birinchi review uchun. $50-100 ham yaxshi boshlang'ich.

tasks.title: Web development xizmatini reklama qiling
tasks.description: Mahalliy bizneslar uchun web sayt xizmati. Restoran, salon, do'konlarga taklif qiling. 5 ta biznesga yozing.

tasks.title: MVP 50% tayyor
tasks.description: MVP kamida 50% tayyor bo'lsin. Asosiy funksiyalar ishlashi kerak.

tasks.title: App Store/Play Store account oching
tasks.description: Google Play ($25 bir martalik) va Apple Developer ($99/yil) account oching. App chiqarish uchun tayyor bo'ling.

tasks.title: Agency bilan bog'laning
tasks.description: Web/Mobile agencylar toping. Subcontractor sifatida ishlashni taklif qiling. 5 ta agencyga yozing.

tasks.title: MVP 70% tayyor
tasks.description: MVP deyarli tayyor. UI polish, bug fix. Beta test uchun tayyorlang.

tasks.title: 3-hafta tahlil
tasks.description: 3 hafta natijasi: birinchi mijoz bormi? Qancha daromad? MVP qanday? Keyingi hafta rejasi.

tasks.title: MVP 100% tayyor va deploy
tasks.description: MVP to'liq tayyor. Deploy qiling: App bo'lsa store'ga, Bot bo'lsa serverga, Web bo'lsa hostingga.

tasks.title: Product Hunt / Hacker News
tasks.description: Mahsulotni Product Hunt'da launch qiling. Yoki Hacker News'da Show HN post qiling. Free traffic.

tasks.title: Bot xizmatidan ikkinchi mijoz
tasks.description: Yana bir bot mijozi toping. Birinchi mijozdan referral so'rang. Review olganingizni ko'rsating.

tasks.title: Birinchi app buyurtmasi
tasks.description: Upwork/Fiverr'dan yoki mahalliy bozordan birinchi Flutter app buyurtmasi oling.

tasks.title: Birinchi web sayt buyurtmasi
tasks.description: Mahalliy biznes uchun web sayt buyurtmasi oling. AI bilan 1-2 kunda tayyorlash mumkin.

tasks.title: Xizmatlar paketini kengaytiring
tasks.description: Maintenance package qo'shing: oylik bot support, app update, web hosting. Recurring revenue.

tasks.title: 1-OY TAHLIL
tasks.description: BIRINCHI OY TUGADI! Jami daromad, mijozlar soni, mahsulot holati. Keyingi oy maqsadni 2x qiling.

tasks.title: Narxlarni 30% oshiring
tasks.description: Tajriba va review bor. Yangi mijozlar uchun narxni 30% oshiring. Professional = qimmat.

tasks.title: Ikkinchi mahsulot boshlang
tasks.description: Birinchi MVP ishlayapti. Ikkinchi mahsulotni boshlang. Boshqa muammoni hal qiling.

tasks.title: Template/UI kit sotishni boshlang
tasks.description: Flutter template, Bot template, Web template - bularni Gumroad, CodeCanyon'da soting.

tasks.title: Startup'lar bilan bog'laning
tasks.description: O'zbek va xorijiy startup'larga yozing. Ular tez harakat qiladi, yaxshi to'laydi.

tasks.title: Yangi AI tool o'rganing
tasks.description: Cursor, v0.dev, Bolt.new, Claude - yangi AI toollardan birini chuqur o'rganing. Tezlikni 2x oshiring.

tasks.title: Premium mijozlarga fokus
tasks.description: Kichik loyihalar o'rniga katta loyihalarga fokus. $1000+ loyihalar qidiring.

tasks.title: 5-hafta tahlil
tasks.description: Daromad dinamikasi, eng foydali xizmat, eng yaxshi mijoz manbasi. Strategiyani optimallashtiring.

tasks.title: Bot xizmatini avtomatlashtiring
tasks.description: Tez-tez so'raladigan bot turlarini 1 kunda yetkazadigan qilib tizim quring. Template + customization.

tasks.title: No-code/Low-code o'rganing
tasks.description: Webflow, Framer o'rganing. Ba'zi loyihalar uchun tezroq va foydali. AI + No-code = super tez.

tasks.title: Monetizatsiya qo'shing
tasks.description: Mahsulotlaringizga to'lov qo'shing: subscription, in-app purchase, premium tier.

tasks.title: Content marketing boshlang
tasks.description: YouTube, Blog, Twitter'da content chiqaring. 'AI bilan bot yasash', 'Flutter tips' - weekly.

tasks.title: Virtual assistant yollang
tasks.description: Oddiy ishlar uchun VA yollang: email, scheduling, research. $3-5/soat. Vaqtingizni coding'ga sarflang.

tasks.title: App subscription qo'shing
tasks.description: App'laringizga RevenueCat bilan subscription qo'shing. Monthly recurring revenue.

tasks.title: 6-HAFTA = 1.5 OY
tasks.description: Yarim yo'ldasiz! Daromad maqsadning qancha %? Tezlikni oshirish kerakmi? Action plan tuzing.

tasks.title: Retainer mijozlar toping
tasks.description: Oylik to'lov bilan ishlaydigan 2-3 ta mijoz toping. Masalan: oyiga $500 = maintenance + updates.

tasks.title: Kurs/Tutorial sotishni o'ylang
tasks.description: Udemy, Skillshare, yoki o'z platformangizda kurs soting. 'AI bilan Telegram bot yasash' - hot topic.

tasks.title: Enterprise bot xizmati
tasks.description: Katta kompaniyalar uchun murakkab bot xizmati taklif qiling. CRM integration, analytics. $2000+.

tasks.title: E-commerce xizmati
tasks.description: Online do'kon yasash xizmatini qo'shing. Shopify, WooCommerce yoki custom. Katta bozor.

tasks.title: White-label app xizmati
tasks.description: Bir app'ni white-label qilib ko'p mijozga soting. Bir marta yozing, ko'p marta soting.

tasks.title: Partnership qiling
tasks.description: Designer, Marketer, Backend dev bilan partnership qiling. Katta loyihalarni birga oling.

tasks.title: 2-OY TAHLIL
tasks.description: 2 oy tugadi! Total revenue, eng yaxshi xizmat, eng yaxshi mijoz manbasi. 3-oy maqsadlari.

tasks.title: $5K/oy maqsad
tasks.description: Agar $5K/oyga yetmagan bo'lsangiz, bunga yetish uchun aniq reja tuzing. Qaysi xizmatni scale qilish kerak?

tasks.title: SaaS mahsulot boshlang
tasks.description: B2B SaaS boshlang. Kichik bizneslar uchun tool. Monthly subscription. AI bilan tez quring.

tasks.title: Paid ads test qiling
tasks.description: Google Ads yoki Facebook Ads bilan $50-100 test qiling. ROI o'lchang.

tasks.title: Bot-as-a-Service
tasks.description: Bot xizmatini SaaS modelga o'tkazing. Oylik subscription: $29-99. Hosting + maintenance included.

tasks.title: Sales skill o'rganing
tasks.description: Texnik skill + Sales skill = 10x daromad. Cold outreach, negotiation, closing haqida o'rganing.

tasks.title: Jamoani kengaytiring
tasks.description: Junior developer yoki freelancer yollang. Siz boshqaring, ular bajarsin. Leverage yarating.

tasks.title: 8-hafta tahlil
tasks.description: 2 oy tugadi. Yil oxirigacha 4-5 oy qoldi. On track misiz? Tezlikni oshiring agar kerak.

tasks.title: Eng yaxshi kanalni 10x qiling
tasks.description: Qaysi xizmat/mahsulot eng ko'p pul keltirdi? Shu kanalga 80% fokus qiling.

tasks.title: 3 ta passive income stream
tasks.description: Kamida 3 ta passive stream bo'lsin: Templates, Apps, Course/Content. Diversifikatsiya.

tasks.title: App portfolio kengaytiring
tasks.description: Kamida 3-5 ta app store'da bo'lsin. Har biri kichik passiv daromad keltirsin.

tasks.title: Recurring web xizmati
tasks.description: Web sayt + hosting + maintenance package. Oyiga $50-200. 10 ta mijoz = $500-2000/oy.

tasks.title: Bot agency boshlang
tasks.description: O'zingizni bot agency sifatida pozitsiyalang. Landing page, case studies, testimonials.

tasks.title: Mentorship boshlang
tasks.description: Junior developerlarga mentorship bering. Soatiga $50-100. Yangi daromad kanali.

tasks.title: 3-OY TAHLIL
tasks.description: 3 oy tugadi! Maqsadning qancha foiziga yetdingiz? Qolgan vaqtda nimani o'zgartirish kerak?

tasks.title: $10K/oy maqsad
tasks.description: $10K/oyga yetish uchun reja tuzing. Bu yerdan keyin o'sish tezroq bo'ladi.

tasks.title: Flagship mahsulot tanlang
tasks.description: Eng yaxshi ishlaydigan mahsulotni flagship qiling. Unga ko'proq invest qiling.

tasks.title: Case study marketing
tasks.description: Har bir xizmat uchun case study yozing. Before/after, natijalar, testimonial.

tasks.title: Outsource 50% ish
tasks.description: Ishingizning 50% ni outsource qiling. Siz faqat sales va strategy bilan shug'ullaning.

tasks.title: Asset sotish imkoniyati
tasks.description: App, bot, SaaS'laringizni sotish imkoniyatini o'rganing. Flippa, Acquire.com.

tasks.title: Advisory role
tasks.description: Startup'larga advisor sifatida qo'shiling. Equity + cash compensation.

tasks.title: 10-HAFTA GRAND TAHLIL
tasks.description: 10 hafta = 2.5 oy. Total daromad, o'sish %, eng yaxshi qarorlar, eng yomon xatolar. Keyingi 10 hafta uchun mega reja.
